The 2024 Paris Olympics are in full swing. For Chinese audiences, watching the competition live at the cinema is an increasingly popular option.

Starting with the opening ceremony last week, cinemas across the country are rolling out the service, allowing sports fans to cheer for Team China together in a public space, just as if they were in Paris.
